use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF NAUSEA AND VOMITING OF PREGNANCY IN WOMEN WHO DO NOT RESPOND TO CONSERVATIVE MANAGEMENT

indications.text:
BONJESTA is indicated for the treatment of nausea and vomiting of pregnancy in women who do not respond
to conservative management.
Limitations of Use
BONJESTA has not been studied in women with hyperemesis gravidarum.
